---
title: '**ATDP Report**'
author: "`r paste0('Produced By: ',Sys.getenv('USERNAME'))`"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%a %b %d, %Y @ %X')`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
documentclass: article
abstract: "**Automatically generated report on user-selected variables from the Agricultural Taxation Data Program administered by Statistics Canada. Results are as-is and not subject to the original programmer's review.**"
fontsize: 11pt
header-includes: \usepackage[default]{droidsans} \usepackage{geometry} \geometry{top=1in,left=1in,bottom=1in,right=1in}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r load_packages, include=FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(devtools)
library(tinytex)
library(kableExtra)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)
library(scales)
library(ggcorrplot)
library(leaps)
library(tseries)

```


```{r import_data, include=FALSE}

load(paste0(getwd(),"/data/",
            "session_data.RData"))

```

# Preamble

The user has selected the following variables for **`r selected_prov`**:

```{r report_vars, results='asis',echo=FALSE}

cat("\n")
cat(paste0("* ",selected_vars),
    sep = "\n")

```

The data run from **`r min(selected_atdp$REF_DATE)` to `r max(selected_atdp$REF_DATE)`** and were last updated on **`r atdp_issue_date`**.

Reported values are at the **`r selected_type`** level.

The selected level of analytical complexity is: **`r selected_complexity`**

\newpage

```{r process_data, include=FALSE}

reports<-as.list(rep(0,length(selected_vars)))

if(selected_complexity=="Simple (Summary, Graphs)"){
  for(v in 1:length(reports)){reports[[v]]<-as.list(rep(0,2))}
}
if(selected_complexity=="Expanded (Simple + Linear Fit)"){
  for(v in 1:length(reports)){reports[[v]]<-as.list(rep(0,3))}
}
if(selected_complexity=="Complex (Expanded + Correlation)"){
  for(v in 1:length(reports)){reports[[v]]<-as.list(rep(0,6))}
}

names(reports)<-selected_vars

for(v in 1:length(selected_vars)){
  
  loop_data<-selected_atdp %>%
    mutate(Estimates=as.character(Estimates),
           REF_DATE=round(as.numeric(REF_DATE),0)) %>%
    filter(Estimates==selected_vars[v]) %>%
    mutate(Date=REF_DATE,
           Value=VALUE,
           Trend=REF_DATE-min(REF_DATE)+1)
  
  names(reports[[v]])[1]<-"summary"
  names(reports[[v]])[2]<-"graph"
  
  # Summary Statistics
  
  var_summary<-c(summary(loop_data$VALUE),sd(loop_data$VALUE))
  names(var_summary)[7]<-"SDev."
  var_summary_values<-as.numeric(round(var_summary,0))
  var_summary_values<-format(var_summary_values,
                             nsmall=0,
                             big.mark=",")
  var_summary_names<-names(var_summary)
  var_summary<-as.data.frame(
    cbind(var_summary_names,
          var_summary_values))
  names(var_summary)<-c("name","value")
  
  var_summary<-paste0("* ",
                      var_summary$name,
                      " - ",
                      var_summary$value)
  
  reports[[v]][[1]]<-var_summary
  
  rm(var_summary_values,
     var_summary_names,
     var_summary)
  
  # Graphs
  
  ymin<-min(0,as.numeric(min(loop_data$Value))*1.2)
  ymax<-max(as.numeric(loop_data$Value))*1.2
  
  vert_offset<-ymax*0.05
  horz_offset<--0.2
  
  var_graph<-suppressMessages(
    ggplot(data = loop_data,
           aes(Date,
               Value)) +
      geom_line() +
      geom_point() +
      ggtitle(selected_vars[v]) + 
      geom_text(aes(label = format(Value,
                                   nsmall=0,
                                   big.mark=",")),
                nudge_y = vert_offset,
                nudge_x = horz_offset,
                check_overlap = TRUE,
                size=2.25) +
      scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(
        accuracy = 1,
        big.mark = "")) +
      scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                         limits = c(ymin,ymax))
  )
  
  reports[[v]][[2]]<-var_graph
  
  rm(ymin,
     ymax,
     var_graph,
     vert_offset,
     horz_offset)
  
  if((selected_complexity=="Expanded (Simple + Linear Fit)")|
     (selected_complexity=="Complex (Expanded + Correlation)")){
    
    names(reports[[v]])[3]<-"linear"
    
    # Linear fit
    
    var_linear<-lm(as.numeric(loop_data$Value)~loop_data$Trend)
    
    linear_summary<-summary(var_linear)
    
    var_linear_summary<-c(
      paste0("* Intercept: ",
             format(round(linear_summary$coefficients[1,1],0),
                    nsmall=0,
                    big.mark=","),
             " (t = ",round(linear_summary$coefficients[1,3],1),")"),
      paste0("* Trend: ",
             format(round(linear_summary$coefficients[2,1],0),
                    nsmall=0,
                    big.mark=","),
             " (t = ",round(linear_summary$coefficients[2,3],1),")"))
    
    reports[[v]][[3]]<-var_linear_summary
    
    rm(var_linear,
       linear_summary,
       var_linear_summary)
    
    # Add fit line to graph
    
    ymin<-min(0,as.numeric(min(loop_data$Value))*1.2)
    ymax<-max(as.numeric(loop_data$Value))*1.2
    
    vert_offset<-ymax*0.05
    horz_offset<--0.2
    
    var_graph<-suppressMessages(
      ggplot(data = loop_data,
             aes(Date,
                 Value)) + 
        geom_smooth(method = "lm",
                    se=FALSE,
                    col="red",
                    lty=2,
                    lwd=0.75,
                    formula = 'y ~ x') +
        geom_line() +
        geom_point() +
        ggtitle(selected_vars[v]) + 
        geom_text(aes(label = format(Value,
                                     nsmall=0,
                                     big.mark=",")),
                  nudge_y = vert_offset,
                  nudge_x = horz_offset,
                  check_overlap = TRUE,
                  size=2.25) +
        scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(
          accuracy = 1,
          big.mark = "")) +
        scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                           limits = c(ymin,ymax))
    )
    
    reports[[v]][[2]]<-var_graph
    
    rm(ymin,
       ymax,
       var_graph,
       vert_offset,
       horz_offset)
    
  }
  
  if(selected_complexity=="Complex (Expanded + Correlation)"){
    
    # Autoregression/ADF Test
    
    names(reports[[v]])[4]<-"autoreg"
    
    var_auto_frame<-loop_data %>%
      select(REF_DATE,
             Value,
             Trend) %>%
      mutate(Value_m1=lag(Value,
                          n=1,
                          order_by = REF_DATE))
    
    adf_result<-adf.test(var_auto_frame$Value)
    
    var_auto_frame<-var_auto_frame %>%
      filter(!is.na(Value_m1))
    
    auto_result<-lm(var_auto_frame$Value~var_auto_frame$Value_m1)
    auto_fitted<-auto_result$fitted.values
    auto_fitted<-c(NA,auto_fitted)
    auto_result<-summary(auto_result)
    
    var_auto_summary<-c(
      paste0("* Intercept: ",
             format(round(auto_result$coefficients[1,1],0),
                    nsmall=0,
                    big.mark=","),
             " (t = ",round(auto_result$coefficients[1,3],1),")"),
      paste0("* Lag-1: ",
             format(round(auto_result$coefficients[2,1],1),
                    nsmall=0,
                    big.mark=","),
             " (t = ",round(auto_result$coefficients[2,3],1),")"),
      paste0("* ADF Result: ",
             format(round(as.numeric(adf_result$statistic),1),
                    nsmall=0,
                    big.mark=",")))
    
    reports[[v]][[4]]<-var_auto_summary
    
    rm(var_auto_frame,
       adf_result,
       auto_result,
       var_auto_summary)
    
    # Multiple regression t-tests
    
    names(reports[[v]])[5]<-"multireg"
    
    var_mreg_frame<-selected_atdp %>%
      mutate(Value=as.numeric(VALUE),
             Trend=as.numeric(REF_DATE)-min(as.numeric(REF_DATE))+1) %>%
      mutate(Estimates=gsub("Revenue - ",
                            "",
                            Estimates),
             Estimates=gsub("Expense - ",
                            "",
                            Estimates),
             Estimates=gsub(" revenues",
                            " rev.",
                            Estimates),
             Estimates=gsub(" expenses",
                            " exp.",
                            Estimates),
             Estimates=gsub(" operating",
                            " op.",
                            Estimates),
             Estimates=gsub(" and ",
                            "/",
                            Estimates),
             Estimates=gsub(",.*$",
                            "",
                            Estimates),
             Estimates=gsub("\\(.*$",
                            "",
                            Estimates)) %>%
      select(Value,
             Trend,
             Estimates) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = "Estimates",
                  values_from = "Value")
    
    var_mreg_y<-as.vector(unlist(var_mreg_frame[,(v+1)]))
    var_mreg_x<-1:(length(selected_vars)+1)
    var_mreg_x<-var_mreg_x[which(var_mreg_x!=(v+1))]
    var_mreg_x<-as.data.frame(var_mreg_frame[,var_mreg_x])
    
    best_mreg<-regsubsets(var_mreg_y~.,
                          data = var_mreg_x,
                          nbest = 1,
                          method = "exhaustive",
                          force.in = c(1))
    best_mreg<-gsub("`",
                    "",
                    names(coef(best_mreg,1))[2:3])
    
    var_mreg_x_best<-which(names(var_mreg_x) %in% best_mreg)
    var_mreg_x_best<-as.matrix(var_mreg_frame[,var_mreg_x_best])
    
    best_mreg<-lm(var_mreg_y~var_mreg_x_best)
    mreg_fitted<-best_mreg$fitted.values
    best_mreg<-summary(best_mreg)
    
    row.names(best_mreg$coefficients)<-gsub("var_mreg_x_best",
                                            "",
                                            row.names(best_mreg$coefficients))
    
    var_best_summary<-c(
      paste0("* Intercept: ",
             format(round(best_mreg$coefficients[1,1],0),
                    nsmall=0,
                    big.mark=","),
             " (t = ",round(best_mreg$coefficients[1,3],1),")"),
      paste0("* Trend: ",
             format(round(best_mreg$coefficients[2,1],0),
                    nsmall=0,
                    big.mark=","),
             " (t = ",round(best_mreg$coefficients[2,3],1),")"),
      paste0("* ",row.names(best_mreg$coefficients)[3],": ",
             format(round(best_mreg$coefficients[3,1],1),
                    nsmall=0,
                    big.mark=","),
             " (t = ",round(best_mreg$coefficients[3,3],1),")"))
    
    reports[[v]][[5]]<-var_best_summary
    
    rm(var_mreg_frame,
       var_mreg_y,
       var_mreg_x,
       best_mreg,
       var_mreg_x_best,
       var_best_summary)
    
    # Visualize more complex models
    
    loop_data$auto_fitted<-auto_fitted
    loop_data$mreg_fitted<-mreg_fitted
    
    ymin<-min(0,as.numeric(min(loop_data$Value))*1.2)
    ymax<-max(as.numeric(loop_data$Value))*1.2
    
    vert_offset<-ymax*0.05
    horz_offset<--0.2
    
    var_graph<-suppressMessages(
      ggplot(data = loop_data,
             aes(x=Date,
                 y=Value)) + 
        geom_smooth(method = "lm",
                    se=FALSE,
                    col="red",
                    lty=2,
                    lwd=0.75,
                    formula = 'y ~ x') +
        geom_line(aes(y=auto_fitted),color="blue",lty=3,lwd=1) +
        geom_line(aes(y=mreg_fitted),color="darkgreen",lty=3,lwd=1) +
        geom_line(aes(y=Value)) +
        geom_point(aes(y=Value)) +
        ggtitle(selected_vars[v]) + 
        geom_text(aes(label = format(Value,
                                     nsmall=0,
                                     big.mark=",")),
                  nudge_y = vert_offset,
                  nudge_x = horz_offset,
                  check_overlap = TRUE,
                  size=2.25) +
        scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(
          accuracy = 1,
          big.mark = "")) +
        scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma,
                           limits = c(ymin,ymax))
    )
    
    reports[[v]][[6]]<-var_graph
    
    rm(ymin,
       ymax,
       var_graph,
       vert_offset,
       horz_offset,
       auto_fitted,
       mreg_fitted)
    
  }
  
}

rm(v)

if(selected_complexity=="Complex (Expanded + Correlation)"){
  
  # Correlation
  
  var_cor_frame<-selected_atdp %>%
    mutate(value=as.numeric(VALUE)) %>%
    mutate(Estimates=gsub("Revenue - ",
                          "",
                          Estimates),
           Estimates=gsub("Expense - ",
                          "",
                          Estimates),
           Estimates=gsub(" revenues",
                          " rev.",
                          Estimates),
           Estimates=gsub(" expenses",
                          " exp.",
                          Estimates),
           Estimates=gsub(" operating",
                          " op.",
                          Estimates),
           Estimates=gsub(" and ",
                          "/",
                          Estimates),
           Estimates=gsub(",.*$",
                          "",
                          Estimates),
           Estimates=gsub("\\(.*$",
                          "",
                          Estimates)) %>%
    select(value,
           REF_DATE,
           Estimates) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = "Estimates",
                values_from = "value") %>%
    select(-REF_DATE)
  
  var_cor_matrix<-data.matrix(var_cor_frame)
  
  var_p_matrix<-round(cor_pmat(var_cor_matrix),3)
  var_cor_matrix<-round(cor(var_cor_matrix),2)
  
  var_cor_plot<-suppressMessages(ggcorrplot(
    var_cor_matrix,
    p.mat = var_p_matrix,
    method = "circle",
    type = "lower", 
    lab = TRUE,
    title = "Correlation Matrix of Selected Data",
    ggtheme = theme_minimal))
  
  rm(var_cor_frame,
     var_cor_matrix,
     var_p_matrix)
  
}

```

```{r produce_report, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}

for(v in 1:length(reports)){
  
  cat(paste0("# ","Report: ",names(reports)[v],"\n"))
  
  for(r in 1:length(reports[[v]])){
    
    if(r==1){
      cat(paste0("## ","Basic Summary","\n"))
      cat(reports[[v]][[1]],sep = "\n")
    }
    cat("\n")
    if(r==2){
      cat(paste0("## ","Graphic Summary","\n"))
      suppressWarnings(print(reports[[v]][[2]]))
      cat("\n")
    }
    cat("\n")
    if(r==3){
      cat(paste0("## ","Linear Trend Model (RED line)","\n"))
      cat(reports[[v]][[3]],sep = "\n")
      cat("\n")
      cat("\\newpage")
      cat("\n")
    }
    cat("\n")
    if(r==4){
      cat(paste0("## ","AR1 Model (BLUE line)","\n"))
      cat(reports[[v]][[4]],sep = "\n")
    }
    cat("\n")
    if(r==5){
      cat(paste0("## ","Best Trend + 1 Var. Linear Model (GREEN line)","\n"))
      cat(reports[[v]][[5]],sep = "\n")
    }
    cat("\n")
    if(r==6){
      cat(paste0("## ","Complex Graphic Summary","\n"))
      suppressWarnings(print(reports[[v]][[6]]))
      cat("\n")
    }
    cat("\n")
  }
  
  cat("\\newpage")
  
}

cat(paste0("# ","Report: All Vars. Correlation","\n"))
suppressWarnings(print(var_cor_plot))

```
